tool_description: ExchangeRate-API.com has been providing a popular & reliable currency conversion API for over 10 years. All 160 major world currencies are supported and responses are readable JSON. Tens of thousands of developers have picked ExchangeRate-API.com for its exceptional long term uptime record, reliable data and simple lightweight request formats - you should give it a try!
